purpose: Retrieve finalized claim history for one policy before the current claim's reported date, then derive transparent counts for policy-rule evaluation.

inputs.before_claim_reported_date: Required. Current claim reported date; only earlier historical claims are considered.
inputs.optional_claim_category: Optional. Use for category-specific retrieval; theft limit calculation should use THEFT.

derived_outputs.prior_claim_record_count: Count of all historical records for the policy before the supplied date.
derived_outputs.recent_90_day_claim_count: Count of historical claims reported in the 90 days preceding the supplied date.
derived_outputs.records: Underlying finalized history records used for the calculation.

business_guardrails: Only claim_limit_consumed_flag controls LIM-001; declined and withdrawn records do not consume the allowance.
High volume or recent history may support a later MANUAL_REVIEW risk signal but must never automatically decline a claim.
The tool must return source records and derived counts so the agent can cite its calculation.
